# Kelnix

> Applications for humans, APIs for agents. Any technology, any solution — from concept to production.

Kelnix is a software engineering company that builds two things:
1. **Applications for humans** — web apps, SPAs, and platforms built with modern frameworks.
2. **APIs for agents** — integrations, LLM orchestration, and autonomous workflows that let AI agents do the heavy lifting.

## Services

- **Custom AI Integration**: We integrate AI into any company, with any service they need — chatbots, RAG over internal docs, workflow automation, data analysis, sales and marketing AI, and bespoke LLM apps, connected to the tools they already use. https://kelnix.org/custom-ai-integration
- **Web Development**: Custom web apps, SPAs, and platforms built with modern frameworks (React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, etc.)
- **AI & Automation**: APIs and integrations for LLM orchestration, autonomous agent workflows, and intelligent automation.
- **Cloud & DevOps**: Scalable infrastructure on AWS, GCP, and Azure with CI/CD, IaC, and container orchestration.
- **Mobile Development**: Cross-platform mobile apps using React Native and Flutter.

## Products

- **Cladget**: A financial dashboard that unifies revenue and cost data from Stripe, AWS, OpenAI, Vercel, GitHub, Google Cloud and more into one place — real-time profit, burn rate, runway and AI-powered insights. https://kelnix.org/cladget · https://cladget.app
- **Kelnix Receipt MCP API**: Turn any receipt into structured, accounting-ready JSON or Markdown with one API call. https://kelnix.org/products/receipt-mcp
- **Kelnix DataMind Curator**: AI-Ready Data & Context Engineering API — connect any source, query with natural language, clean data, build AI context, redact PII. https://kelnix.org/products/datamind-curator
- **Nibs**: A fun, casual mobile game. https://kelnix.org/products/nibs

## Contact

Email: info@kelnix.org
Website: https://kelnix.org
